positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a celestial animal fusion, combining the grace of a leaping deer with the ethereal glow of a crescent moon and stylized constellations. The composition should feature the deer in a dynamic, central pose, outlined by geometric, abstract star trails and vibrant nebula dust. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, cosmic teal, matte gold, and crisp white. The style must be highly detailed, vector-like linework with negative space contrast, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Strong contrast, symmetrical balance, and clean, thick outlines are mandatory. Perfect for merchandise.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, copyright, celebrity, grayscale, photorealism, messy, gradients, realistic photo
